title: Book This Activity
payFullTooltip: Secure your booking with the full payment.
payDepositTooltip: Secure your spot now with a deposit. Easy, flexible and the remaining balance is paid to your guide on the day.
depositReminder: A small reminder: the balance due will be paid on the day of the tour — cash payment is appreciated.
regionMismatchWarning: Your hotel is in different region, but this tour picks up in that region. The closest meeting point in that region has been selected.
stripeRefundPolicy: Cancellation Policy: Payment processing fees (approx. 1.5% - 2.9% + €0.25, applied by Stripe) are non-refundable in the event of customer cancellation.
